behavior_summary: U8P_AIRFOCUS implements two processes: a U8P_AIRFOCUS::look() handler that reports a short, player-facing label for an AIRFOCUS item based on the item's frame index, and a U8P_AIRFOCUS::use() handler that activates (spawns) AIRSPEL behaviors for certain frame values.

U8P_AIRFOCUS::look() reads the item frame (uword Item::getFrame(this)) and selects one of many short barks/labels (frames 0x00..0x11 map to distinct 'focus' names). This is a read-only display action with no flag side-effects.

U8P_AIRFOCUS::use() initializes a small temporary/local state, checks the same frame value, and for a subset of frames spawns corresponding AIRSPEL functions (dispatching the actual spell/effect). Some spawn calls include an extra literal argument (observed for frames 0x09 and 0x0B).

No global flags are read or written by these handlers; the logic is local to the item instance and spawn operations. U8P_AIRFOCUS::look() is purely descriptive; U8P_AIRFOCUS::use() performs effect dispatch via spawn + suspend.
notable_control_flow: U8P_AIRFOCUS::look branches on Item::getFrame(this) for exact frame values 0x00..0x11 and emits a single Bark for each branch (short label per frame).

U8P_AIRFOCUS::use sets a temporary local (local1 = 0), obtains a pid/target, then for specific frames executes spawn(AIRSPEL::funcXXXX, ...) followed by a suspend pattern; two spawns include an extra 0x01 literal argument.

Only a subset of frames (notably 0x08..0x0F and 0x11) are observed to trigger spawn calls; lower-numbered frames still produce descriptive barks in U8P_AIRFOCUS::look() but do not show spawn activity in the decompiled excerpt.
open_questions: Which exact in-game targets (player vs. caster vs. item owner) are passed as the pid argument to the AIRSPEL spawn calls? The decompilation suggests a pid is fetched but the precise identity is inferred, not explicit.
Do frames 0x00..0x07 correspond to any active effects when used, or are they purely descriptive (U8P_AIRFOCUS::look-only)? The extracted code shows spawn calls for 0x08..0x0F and 0x11 only.
What is the intended meaning of the temporary local 'local1' in U8P_AIRFOCUS::use()? It appears to be a short-lived activation flag but its broader role (e.g., cooldown/guard) is not explicit.

main_function.name: U8P_AIRFOCUS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short descriptive label presented to the player when they inspect/examine the AIRFOCUS item; selects the label based on Item::getFrame(this).
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player performs a U8P_AIRFOCUS::look/examine action on the AIRFOCUS item (process type 0x0208).
Branches deterministically on the item's frame value (0x00..0x11) to produce the appropriate label/bark.

function_map.name: U8P_AIRFOCUS::look
function_map.role: Inspect/display handler that maps item frame to human-readable focus label (bark).

function_map.name: U8P_AIRFOCUS::use
function_map.role: Activation handler: prepares local state and spawns AIRSPEL behaviors corresponding to certain focus frames.

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func00CF
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement the Divination-focus spell (mapped from frame 0x08).

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func0BEB
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Healing Touch (mapped from frame 0x09); observed spawn includes literal 0x01 argument.

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func11AA
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement the Aerial Servant (mapped from frame 0x0A).

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func1E4B
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Restoration (mapped from frame 0x0B); observed spawn includes literal 0x01 argument.

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func2506
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Fade From Sight (mapped from frame 0x0C).

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func27ED
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Air Walk (mapped from frame 0x0D).

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func2CC0
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Hear Truth (mapped from frame 0x0E).

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func2F00
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Intervention (mapped from frame 0x0F).

function_map.name: AIRSPEL::func314A
function_map.role: Spawned effect: appears to implement Reveal focus (mapped from frame 0x11).

external_calls.purpose: Spawn the Divination-focus spell/effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x08.
Spawn the Healing Touch effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x09; observed with extra literal 0x01 argument.
Spawn the Aerial Servant effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x0A.
Spawn the Restoration effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x0B; observed with extra literal 0x01 argument.
Spawn the Fade From Sight effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x0C.
Spawn the Air Walk effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x0D.
Spawn the Hear Truth effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x0E.
Spawn the Intervention effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x0F.
Spawn the Reveal-focus effect when Item::getFrame(this) == 0x11.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_AIRFOCUS implements two processes: a U8P_AIRFOCUS::look() handler that reports a short, player-facing label for an AIRFOCUS item based on the item's frame index, and a U8P_AIRFOCUS::use() handler that activates (spawns) AIRSPEL behaviors for certain frame values.
